Version 3.0 Sandbox Release

The Intelligent Sell & Growth Your Business

One unified platform to manage your sales, customer conversations, AI voice agents, automated workflows, and online catalog — built for growing businesses.

Explore Our Modular Ecosystem

AI Assistant

AI Assistant

Our AI Voice Agent runs on advanced real-time voice and WebRTC technologies, giving your business an automated receptionist that listens, understands, and speaks naturally. It schedules meetings directly into calendars, checks real-time database details, and logs caller sentiment metrics instantly.

Real-time VoIP with WebRTC voice communication
Instant speech transcription & sentiment tracking
Multi-lingual support (English, Hindi, Arabic, Tamil)
Autonomously schedules CRM meetings & follow-ups
WhatsApp Business

Official API Chat & Broadcast Inbox

Leverage the official WhatsApp Business API to interact with customers. Provide instant order updates, broadcast marketing campaigns, and let your support team work from a single unified omnichannel dashboard. Includes AI suggestions for faster response times.

Unified team shared inbox for all agents
Automated WhatsApp catalog cataloging & checkouts
Broadcasting templates for promo campaigns
AI-driven automated replies for FAQs
App Business

Branded Android & iOS Mobile Ecosystem

Give your brand a premium feel with custom mobile applications for Android and iOS. Your catalog updates automatically, and customers receive push notifications for orders, sales, and customized loyalty programs. Completely integrated with modern payment gateways.

Native iOS & Android apps with smooth performance
Real-time catalog, stock, and inventory synchronization
Direct push notification engine for customer retention
Pre-integrated payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay)
Website Business

SEO-Optimized Enterprise Landing Pages

Drive search traffic and capture high-intent leads using fast, responsive web pages. Built on static generation techniques to ensure maximum performance score (99+ Lighthouse), automatic catalog rendering, and instant lead capture forms connected straight to your SellGrow CRM.

Super-fast, SEO-optimized web landing pages
Dynamic catalog generation with brochure downloads
Lead generation forms syncing directly to CRM
Fully responsive desktop, tablet, and mobile layouts

A Single Control Center for Your Entire Business

Say goodbye to scattered SaaS bills. SellGrow unites your sales pipelines, customer chat channels, automated workflows, and AI voice agents under one powerful, modular ecosystem.

Business Website & Catalog

Business Website & Catalog

Generate mobile-responsive landing pages, multi-variant catalogue products, and download brochures instantly.

AI CRM & GPS Logs

Record real-time field executive coordinate check-ins, sales goals, targets, and automatic meeting transcriptions.

Unified Omnichannel Inbox

Respond to chats from WhatsApp Business API, Instagram, FB Messenger, Telegram, and Live Chat from a single page.

AI Voice Agents

AI Voice Agents

Run voice recognition receptionists using WebRTC, transcription, voice activity detection, and automatic summaries.

AI Workflows Automation

AI Workflows Automation

Create complex event-driven automation chains (IF/ELSE, delay nodes, webhook posts, calendar updates) visually.

RAG Vector Knowledge Base

RAG Vector Knowledge Base

Upload PDFs, Word docs, spreadsheets, policy terms, and let SellGrow semantic search feed answers to chatbot interfaces.

The AI-Powered Digital Business Operating System. Manage website, catalog, sales CRM, client channels, and LiveKit voice calls from a single dashboard.
